---
title: "Soils Visualization"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
  output_dir: "reports/figures"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 6, dpi = 300)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)

dir.create(here(params$output_dir), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Load transformed data

```{r load}
soils       <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_soils_transformed.rds")))
peat_smry   <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_peat_summary.rds")))
```

## Soil profile plots — horizon depth, colour, and material

```{r fig-profiles, fig.height=8}
profile_plot <- function(pit_data) {
  ggplot(pit_data,
         aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1,
             ymin = -depth_bot_cm, ymax = -depth_top_cm,
             fill = munsell_hex)) +
    geom_rect(colour = "grey40") +
    geom_text(aes(x = 0.5, y = -(depth_top_cm + depth_bot_cm) / 2,
                  label = paste0(horizon_code, "\n", texture)),
              size = 3) +
    scale_fill_identity() +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, -200, by = -10),
                       labels = abs(seq(0, -200, by = -10))) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Depth (cm)",
         title = paste("Soil Profile —", unique(pit_data$plot_id))) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
}

# Generate one profile per plot
plots <- soils |>
  group_by(plot_id) |>
  group_map(~ profile_plot(.x), .keep = TRUE)

for (p in plots) print(p)
```

## Peat profiles by Von Post humification

```{r fig-peat-vonpost}
p_vp <- soils |>
  filter(material_type %in% c("peat", "muck")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = plot_id,
             ymin = -depth_bot_cm, ymax = -depth_top_cm,
             fill = von_post)) +
  geom_linerange(size = 8) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "YlOrBr", name = "Von Post") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = ~ abs(.)) +
  labs(title = "Peat Profiles by Von Post Humification",
       x = "Plot ID", y = "Depth (cm)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_vp
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_peat_vonpost.png"), p_vp, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Peat isopach — professional grade

```{r fig-isopach-professional}
# TODO: requires spatial coordinates per plot_id; generate interpolated isopach
# using terra::interpIDW or kriging once plot coordinates are joined
p_pro <- peat_smry |>
  filter(peat_grade == "Professional") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(plot_id, -thickness_cm), y = thickness_cm)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#8c510a") +
  labs(title = "Professional Peat Thickness by Plot",
       x = "Plot ID", y = "Thickness (cm)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_pro
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_peat_professional.png"), p_pro, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Peat isopach — retail grade

```{r fig-isopach-retail}
p_ret <- peat_smry |>
  filter(peat_grade == "Retail") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(plot_id, -thickness_cm), y = thickness_cm)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#bf812d") +
  labs(title = "Retail Peat Thickness by Plot",
       x = "Plot ID", y = "Thickness (cm)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_ret
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_peat_retail.png"), p_ret, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
